description: Pre-stuffed repeated tool calls — after seeing the same command run 3 times with results, does the model break out or repeat again?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use tools to investigate and fix the project. Make progress on each turn — do not repeat actions you have already taken.
Set up the project dependencies and verify pydantic is installed.

Name: pydantic
Version: 2.5.0
Summary: Data validation using Python type hints
Location: /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages
Requires: annotated-types, pydantic-core, typing-extensions

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

expect.notes: After 3 identical pip show pydantic calls all returning the same result, a well-behaved model should conclude pydantic is installed and either (a) move on to the next task, (b) confirm success with a text response, or (c) take a different action. Failure mode: model emits a 4th identical bash(cmd='pip show pydantic') call, demonstrating it cannot synthesize tool results into updated state — the repetition loop behavior observed in GLM-4.7-Flash IQ2_M across 10+ consecutive turns.
